domains.public_safe_note: Prepare a dated authorship and invention-history question list without claiming ownership disputes are resolved.
questions: What invention records should be preserved before any public launch claim?
How should contribution history be recorded while the project is solo-operated?
Which materials should stay private until qualified review?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare name and trademark questions without claiming clearance.
questions: Which names need clearance review before broader public use?
Which public pages use each name today?
What should change if a name is not clear?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare formation questions without creating or claiming a company entity.
questions: What event should trigger company formation review?
Which obligations begin after formation?
What records should be ready before formation?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare accounting questions without claiming tax readiness.
questions: What records should exist before spending or earning money?
How should project expenses be tracked before company formation?
What tax questions must be answered before paid launch?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare terms and privacy questions without opening customer access.
questions: What user data would the product handle in a future pilot?
What terms are required before customer access?
What privacy notices are required before customer access?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare invention-boundary questions without claiming patent protection.
questions: Which invention boundaries are stable enough for review?
Which public disclosures should be delayed until review?
What prior-art questions should be prepared?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare compliance questions without claiming regulated-use readiness.
questions: Which data categories are expected in future use?
Which regulated domains must stay blocked?
What retention and deletion questions need review?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare payment questions without processing real payments.
questions: What must exist before processing real payments?
What refund and dispute duties would apply?
What ledger evidence is required before money movement?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare team and contractor questions without inviting contributors.
questions: What agreement would be needed before outside contribution?
What access should stay blocked for future contributors?
How should contribution ownership be recorded?

domains.public_safe_note: Prepare support and liability questions without opening customer access.
questions: What support duties would begin with customer access?
What incident response promises must be avoided until ready?
What liability boundary questions need review?

next_action: refine one question area at a time; do not promote readiness without qualified review or signed witness evidence
